inputs.titre: Marriage of Anne de Bretagne and Louis XII

reason: The image depicts a scene resembling the marriage of Anne de Bretagne and Louis XII. The clothing and architecture appear to be generally consistent with the late 15th century. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms like modern technology or fantasy elements. However, the lighting seems unusually soft and the details are slightly softened, suggesting it may be digitally generated. The fabric textures also lack the crispness often seen in paintings of the period, suggesting some AI assistance.
